label: Hearthhull, the Worldseed
desc: Jund Lands-matter commander deck led by Hearthhull, the Worldseed

cards.name: Hearthhull, the Worldseed
cards.text:
Station (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery. It's an artifact creature at 8+.)

cards.name: Braids, Arisen Nightmare
cards.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice an artifact, creature, enchantment, land, or planeswalker. Lord Windgrace can be your commander.
